item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses to open another transfer channel, explicitly identifies the repeated pattern across the expedited pool, supplement queue, supervisor line, and current transfer dispute, and moves upstream to intake attribution, evidence completeness, responsibility boundaries, and adjudication ownership.
